mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dog ( DOGNO, MEMBERNO, NAME, BREED, AGE, GENDER, FILE1, FILE1SAVED, THUMB1, SIZE1, DBTI_TYPE, RDATE ) VALUES ( DOG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{memberno}, #{name}, #{breed}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{file1}, #{file1saved}, #{thumb1}, #{size1}, #{dbti_type}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT DOGNO, MEMBERNO, NAME, BREED, AGE, GENDER, FILE1, FILE1SAVED, THUMB1, SIZE1, DBTI_TYPE, RDATE FROM dog WHERE MEMBERNO = #{memberno} ORDER BY DOGNO DESC
SELECT DOGNO, MEMBERNO, NAME, BREED, AGE, GENDER, FILE1, FILE1SAVED, THUMB1, SIZE1, DBTI_TYPE, RDATE FROM dog WHERE DOGNO = #{dogno}
mapper.update: UPDATE dog SET NAME = #{name}, BREED = #{breed}, AGE = #{age}, GENDER = #{gender}, FILE1 = #{file1}, FILE1SAVED = #{file1saved}, THUMB1 = #{thumb1}, SIZE1 = #{size1} WHERE DOGNO = #{dogno}
